prerequisites: Build the Armament Institute (no further upgrades needed)
Complete all 4 Armament Research items in order

how_to_unlock.step_2: Build the Armament Institute - no upgrades required
how_to_unlock.step_3: Complete all 4 Armament Research items - this is the main bottleneck
how_to_unlock.step_4: Pay final Unlock cost to make T11 available in Barracks
how_to_unlock.note: Research must be completed in order: Helmet first, then Body Armor, Accessories, Weapon

Armament_Core.note: Required every 5th research level - low drop probability, main bottleneck

Oil.note: Required only for the final 99-100% of each research and the Unlock cost

research_costs.note: Research costs increment every 50%. Final 1% (99-100%) requires Oil and Armament Cores.

Weapon.note: Armament Cores required every 3% for this research, and every 2% after reaching 51%

Unlock_cost.note: Final one-time cost after completing all 4 research items before T11 becomes available in Barracks

troop_power_improvement.March_Size: Improve via research (Mastery tree), military center buildings, decorations
troop_power_improvement.Unit_Power: Improve via research (Unit tree), buildings, decorations
troop_power_improvement.Armament_Institute: Each research level provides a small boost to Troop Power

restricted_area_training.description: Available via Alert Tower. Send troops to fight bosses and earn Armament Materials and Cores passively.
restricted_area_training.note: Your troop power defines how far you can progress in Restricted Area bosses - higher power = better rewards
